commands.title: /particle
commands.description: Displays particle effects in the world.
commands.breakdown: name = particle ID (e.g., minecraft:huge_explosion_emitter). pos = coordinates.

commands.title: /playsound
commands.description: Plays a specific sound for players.
commands.breakdown: sound = sound ID. target = who hears it. pos = location source for 3D sound.

commands.title: /music
commands.breakdown: track is the path to the music file in resource pack.

commands.title: /camera
commands.description: Sets or clears camera perspectives for players.
commands.breakdown: Powerful for cutscenes, overview shots, or locked perspectives.

commands.title: /camerashake
commands.breakdown: intensity = how hard it shakes. Great for explosions.

commands.title: /stopsound
commands.description: Stops a sound from playing for specific players.

commands.title: /volumes
commands.description: Queries or sets volume levels for sound categories.
